ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shoe_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe size */,
  "usa" REAL /* USA shoe size */,
  "inch" REAL /* Inch measurement */,
  "uk" REAL /* UK shoe size */,
  "eur" REAL /* EUR shoe size */,
  "aus" REAL /* AUS shoe size */,
  "jpn" REAL /* JPN shoe size */,
  "cm" REAL /* CM measurement */,
  "conversion_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversion chart */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shoe_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the shoe style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shoe style */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoe_styles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES shoe_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shoe_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe product */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe style */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe size */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the shoe */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the shoe */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shoe */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the shoe */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Unique Stock Keeping Unit */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the shoe */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the shoe */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the shoe in grams */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoe_products_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES shoe_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoe_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shoe_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the shoe category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shoe category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the warehouse */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last restocked */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold to indicate low stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES shoe_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "discount" REAL /* Any discount applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES shoe_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_options" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping option */,
  "shipping_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping option */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping option */,
  "estimated_delivery_days" INTEGER /* Estimated days for delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping option */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date when the shipment was made */,
  "estimated_arrival_date" TEXT /* Estimated arrival date of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_shipping_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_id") REFERENCES shipping_options ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "preferred_shipping_id" INTEGER /* Preferred shipping option for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_shipping_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_shipping_id") REFERENCES shipping_options ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the order status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  "next_status_id" INTEGER /* Suggested next status for workflow automation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_next_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("next_status_id") REFERENCES order_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status history entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order status */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the order status was updated */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES order_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
